user.title: Camera Record Services
user.description: Add the Camera Record Services integration. No configuration is required.

init.title: Usage Guide
init.description:
## camera_record_services.camera_start_recording

Start recording a camera stream to a file.

| Parameter | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `entity_id` | yes | — | Camera entity to record, e.g. `camera.front_door` |
| `filename` | yes | — | Full path for the output file, e.g. `/media/clip.mp4` |
| `duration` | no | `30` | Maximum recording length in seconds |
| `lookback` | no | `0` | Seconds of stream buffer to include before the call |
| `stop_state_id` | no | — | Entity to watch for an early-stop trigger |
| `stop_state_value` | no | — | State value that triggers the early stop |
| `extend_running_task` | no | `true` | Extend current recording if already in progress |

`stop_state_id` and `stop_state_value` must be provided together or not at all.

---

## camera_record_services.camera_stop_recording

Stop an in-progress recording immediately.

| Parameter | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `entity_id` | yes | Camera entity whose recording should be stopped |

Best-effort — silently does nothing if no recording is in progress.
